content:
Hey folks, noob question here. But why does the Morimens app ask for permission to find devices on local networks? I know you can decline it but I can’t think of a reason the app needs this. There’s no local multiplayer or device casting is there? No other gacha I’ve tried has wanted this. The fact it asks at all is kind of off putting.

I’ve been interested in trying the game for the 2nd anniversary event and the mood soured a bit on install. I wonder if others have hit the same wall.

Thanks for any answers you can provide!
thread_title: IOS App permissions

content:
Thank you for your suggestion. There are some things we also want to do, but we have difficulties. On the one hand, there is a funding issue, and on the other hand, there is a manpower issue. In fact, we do not have any marketing personnel, and there is only one person in charge of community operations who is responsible for everything.
Currently, another colleague in charge of other tasks is contacting KOLs, but it is also difficult to privately message KOLs on a large scale.
We are also arranging the content creator program and will launch it as soon as possible🙏
